mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTRING( r.record_time, 6, 5 ) AS DATE, CASE WEEKDAY( r.record_time ) WHEN 0 THEN '周一' WHEN 1 THEN '周二' WHEN 2 THEN '周三' WHEN 3 THEN '周四' WHEN 4 THEN '周五' WHEN 5 THEN '周六' WHEN 6 THEN '周日' END AS WEEK, r.id, r.amount, r.record_type, SUBSTRING(r.create_time,6,11) create_time, CASE WHEN r.remark IS NOT NULL AND r.remark != '' THEN CONCAT( c.category_name, '-', r.remark ) ELSE c.category_name END AS category_name, SUM( CASE WHEN r.record_type = 2 THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END ) OVER ( PARTITION BY r.record_time ) AS total_income, SUM( CASE WHEN r.record_type = 1 THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END ) OVER ( PARTITION BY r.record_time ) AS total_expense, c.category_icon FROM record r LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = r.category_id WHERE ( -- 用户本人的记录 r.user_id = #{userId} OR -- 家庭组其他成员的记录（如果用户有家庭） r.user_id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM family WHERE group_id = ( SELECT group_id FROM family WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family WHERE user_id = #{userId}) ) ) AND r.record_time LIKE CONCAT( #{time}, '%' ) AND r.amount IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.record_time DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING( record_time, 1, 7 ) FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING( record_time, 1, 4 ) FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT SUM( r.amount ) AS amount, c.category_name, c.category_icon, ROUND( SUM( r.amount ) / total.total_amount * 100, 2 ) AS percent FROM record r LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = r.category_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT SUM( amount ) AS total_amount FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_type = #{recordType} AND record_time LIKE CONCAT( #{time}, '%' ) ) total ON 1 = 1 WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.record_type = #{recordType} AND r.record_time LIKE CONCAT( #{time}, '%' ) GROUP BY r.category_id, c.category_name, c.category_icon, total.total_amount ORDER BY SUM( r.amount ) DESC;

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) income, SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) expense FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_time LIKE CONCAT( #{month}, '%' )

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS income, SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS expense, SUBSTRING( record_time, 6, 2 ) timeStr FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_time LIKE CONCAT( #{year}, '%' ) GROUP BY SUBSTRING( record_time, 6, 2 )

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS income, SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS expense, SUBSTRING( record_time, 1, 4 ) timeStr FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY SUBSTRING( record_time, 1, 4 )
